original: Scientific studies have long correlated an active sex life with healthy muscular development. At the request of Paragon Inc’s best shock troops, Breed-n-Brute was developed to further enhance the effectiveness of a pre-combat ritual beloved across the galaxy: fucking. Thanks to this pituitary gland-sized implant, you too can experience the rush of high grade combat stims any time you ejaculate inside a partner!
